title: Practical Patterns for the Next.js App Router
summary: A deep-dive into Server Components, nested layouts, and parallel routes — with real-world examples from production apps.

title: TypeScript Generics for Real Devs
summary: Stop copy-pasting types. A practical guide to generics, conditional types, and utility types that will make your codebase 10x more maintainable.

summary: The techniques that moved a real e-commerce storefront from a 54 to a 91 Lighthouse score — fonts, images, render blocking, and LCP.
